var JsDom = Packages.org.jsoup.Jsoup; var Document = Packages.org.jsoup.nodes.Document; var Element = Packages.org.jsoup.nodes.Element; var document = JsDom.parse(src); // 获取包含

元素的

元素 var dds = document.select('div.content > dd'); // 将dds转换为数组以便排序 var ddArray = []; for (var i = 0; i < dds.size(); i++) { ddArray.push(dds.get(i)); } // 按照data-id属性对ddArray进行排序 ddArray.sort(function(a, b) { var pageA = parseInt(a.attr('data-id'), 10); var pageB = parseInt(b.attr('data-id'), 10); return pageA - pageB; }); var list = []; var data = { mergedText: "" }; // 遍历排序后的ddArray for (var i = 0; i < ddArray.length; i++) { var dd = ddArray[i]; var dataId = dd.attr('data-id'); // 获取当前dd下的所有

元素的文本内容，保持原有顺序 var paragraphs = dd.select('p'); var paragraphTexts = []; for (var j = 0; j < paragraphs.size(); j++) { var paragraph = paragraphs.get(j); paragraphTexts.push(paragraph.text()); } list.push({ id: dataId, // 使用data-id属性 paragraphs: paragraphTexts // 存储所有

元素的文本内容为数组，保持原有顺序 }); // 合并文本内容，每个

内容后添加换行符，保持原有顺序 data.mergedText += paragraphTexts.join("\n") + "\n"; // 添加额外换行符以便分隔每个dd的内容 } // 输出结果 java.log(JSON.stringify(list)); java.log(data.mergedText); // 返回data对象 result = data.mergedText;

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
var JsDom = Packages.org.jsoup.Jsoup;
var Document = Packages.org.jsoup.nodes.Document;
var Element = Packages.org.jsoup.nodes.Element;
            
var document = JsDom.parse(src);
            
// 获取包含<li>元素的<div>元素
var divs = document.select('ul.list > div');

// 将divs转换为数组以便排序
var divArray = [];
for (var i = 0; i < divs.size(); i++) {
    divArray.push(divs.get(i));
}

// 按照data-id属性对divArray进行排序
divArray.sort(function(a, b) {
    var pageA = parseInt(a.attr('data-id'), 10);
    var pageB = parseInt(b.attr('data-id'), 10);
    return pageA - pageB;
});

var list = [];
// 遍历排序后的divArray
for (var i = 0; i < divArray.length; i++) {
    var div = divArray[i];
    var dataId = div.attr('data-id');
    // 获取当前div下的所有<li>元素
    var lis = div.select('li');
    for (var j = 0; j < lis.size(); j++) {
        var li = lis.get(j);
        var a = li.select('a').first();
        if (a != null) {
            list.push({
                text: a.text(),
                id: dataId, // 使用data-id属性
                url: a.attr('href')
            });
        }
    }
}

//java.log(JSON.stringify(list));
list;
</js>

bookSourceComment:
可以无脑获取搜索地址哦，大家可以试试。
‼️先填入正确的Url再试‼️
searchUrl:
<js> 
var url = baseUrl;
if (!baseUrl.match(/^https?:/i)) {
    java.log('\n\n\n\n‼️请填入正确的Url‼️\n\n\n\n');
}
var html = java.ajax(url + ",{'webView': true}");
//java.log(html);
var doc = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(html);
var form = doc.select('form[action]:not([name~=login]):not([class~=login]):not([id~=login])')[0];
//java.log(form);
var method = form.attr('method');
var action = form.attr('action');
var charset = doc.select('head>meta[charset]').attr('charset');
if (charset == '')
{
    charset = String(doc.select('head>meta[content~=charset=]').attr('content')).replace(/^.*charset=([a-z0-9\-]+).*$/i, 
    '$1');
}
//java.log(method);
//java.log(action);
//java.log(charset);
//桌面版UA
var uaw = "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/91.0.4472.124 Safari/537.36";
//手机版UA
var uam = "Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 7.0; wv) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/4.0 Chrome/48.0.2564.116 Mobile Safari/537.36 T7/10.3 SearchCraft/2.6.2 (baiduboxapp; P1 7.0)";
var headers = {
    //请自行选择UA，↓↓↓填入此处
    "User-Agent" : uaw, "Referer" : String(baseUrl)
};
url = baseUrl.replace(/([^\/])$/i, '$1/') + String(action).replace(/^\//, '');
var body = '';
var option = {};
var sk = form.select('input[name][type="text"],input[name][class="text"]').attr('name');
//java.log(sk);
var es = form.select('input[name]:not([type="submit"])');
for (var it in es)
{
    var e = es[it];
    var k = e.attr('name');
    var v = e.attr('value');
    if (k == sk) {
        //body+=sk+'={{java.encodeURI(key,\''+ charset+'\');}}&';
        body += sk + '={{key}}&';
    }
    else {
        body += k + '=' + v + '&';
    }
}
es = form.select('select[name]');
for (it in es)
{
    var e = es[it];
    var k = e.attr('name');
    var v = e.select('option')[0].attr('value');
    body += k + '=' + v + '&';
}
body = String(body).replace(/&$/, '');
java.log(body);
if (method.match(/post/i))
{
    option = 
    {
        "charset" : String(charset), "method" : String(method), "body" : String(body), "headers" : headers, 
        "webView" : true 
    };
    url += ',' + JSON.stringify(option);
}
else
{
    //get
    option = {
        "charset" : String(charset), "headers" : headers, "webView" : true 
    };
    url += '?' + body + ',' + JSON.stringify(option);
}
java.log(url);
</js>

match=result.match(/d\(".+"[^"]+".+"\)/)
function d(a, b){
	b = java.md5Encode(b)
	iv = b.substring(0, 16)
	key = b.substring(16)
	Cipher=java.createSymmetricCrypto("AES/CBC/PKCS7Padding" ,key,iv)
	return Cipher.decryptStr(a)}
eval(match[0])
</js>

 var srf=title.replace(/ /g,"　");
 var fdr=title.replace(/[0-9]+[\s|\u3000]/g,"");
 var dff=src.replace(new RegExp(arr,"g"),"");
 var dfc=dff.replace(new RegExp("\n.{1,7}"+fdr,"g"),"");
 result=dfc.replace(new RegExp(srf,"g"),"").replace(new RegExp(srt,"g"),"").replace(new RegExp(sfn,"g"),"").replace(new RegExp(sfc,"g"),"");
</js>

ruleSearch.bookList:
<js>
var JsDom = Packages.org.jsoup.Jsoup;
var Document = Packages.org.jsoup.nodes.Document;
var Element = Packages.org.jsoup.nodes.Element;

var document = JsDom.parse(src);

var scripts = document.select("script");

var result = []; // 用于存储最终的 JSON 数据

for (var i = 0; i < scripts.size(); i++) {
    var script = scripts.get(i);
    var scriptContent = script.data();

    // 匹配 self.__next_f.push 的内容
    var regex = /self\.__next_f\.push\((.*)\)/gs; // 使用 /gs 修饰符匹配多行
    var matches = [];
    var match;

    // 遍历所有匹配结果，保留最后一个
    while ((match = regex.exec(scriptContent)) !== null) {
        matches.push(match[1]);
    }

    // 只处理最后一个匹配的内容
    if (matches.length > 0) {
        var content = matches[matches.length - 1]; // 获取最后一个匹配的内容

        // 预处理：将英文逗号（,）替换为 ",\n"
        content = content.replace(/,/g, ",\n");

        // 打印预处理后的结果
        //java.log(content);

        // 匹配 "children":"(.*)" 和 "href":"(.*)" 的正则表达式
        var childrenRegex = /.*?"children.*?":.*?"(.*)\\"/g;
        var hrefRegex = /.*?"href.*?":.*?"(.*)\\"/g;
        var imgRegex = /.*?"src.*?":.*?"(.*)\\/g;

        var childrenMatches = [];
        var hrefMatches = [];
        var imgMatches = [];

        // 提取匹配的内容
        while ((match = childrenRegex.exec(content)) !== null) {
            // 过滤掉以 "$" 开头的 children 内容
            if (!match[1].startsWith("$")) {
                childrenMatches.push(match[1]);
            }
        }
        while ((match = hrefRegex.exec(content)) !== null) {
            // 只匹配以 "/comic.*" 开头的 href 内容
            if (match[1].startsWith("/comic")) {
                hrefMatches.push(match[1]);
            }
        }
        while ((match = imgRegex.exec(content)) !== null) {
            // 只匹配以 ".jpg" 结尾的 src 内容
            if (match[1].endsWith(".jpg")) {
                imgMatches.push(match[1]);
            }
        }

        // 从第2个 "children" 开始处理
        var startIdx = 2; // 第2个元素的索引为12
        if (childrenMatches.length > startIdx) {
            // 按每5个children分组
            for (var j = 0; j < hrefMatches.length; j++) {
                var group = {
                    name: childrenMatches[startIdx + j * 5] || "",
                    latestChapterTitle: childrenMatches[startIdx + j * 5 + 1] || "",
                    kind: childrenMatches.slice(startIdx + j * 5 + 2, startIdx + j * 5 + 5).join(", "),
                    url: hrefMatches[j] || "",
                    img: imgMatches[j] || "" // 如果没有图片，使用默认值
                };
                result.push(group);
            }
        }
    }
}

// 输出 JSON 模板
var jsonTemplate = JSON.stringify(result, null, 4);
java.log(jsonTemplate); // 或者其他方式输出

</js>
$[*]

bookSourceComment:
感谢 @柚屿.  提供方法
by天天的鸟蛋蛋 修改简介
提供的原方法
<js>
name = java.getString("h1@text")
author = java.getString("class.module-info-item-content.0@a@text") 
kind = java.getString("class.module-info-tag@text").replace("\/",",") 
lastchapter = java.getString("class.module-info-item-content.3@text").replace("更新至","") 
i = java.getString("class.module-info-introduction-content@text").replace("　　","　　简介：")
t = java.getStringList("#y-playList@span@text")
r = java.getStringList("#y-playList@small@text")
v = book.getVariable("custom") !="" ? book.getVariable("custom") : "0"
if(v > t.length || v < 0) { v = Math.floor(Math.random() * n.length); }
java.put("v",v)
n = "接口: "
for (o = 0; o < t.length; o++) {
  f = t[o] + "(共 " + r[o] + " 集)" + "，"
  n += f
}
intro = i + "\n" + n + "\n注:填写书籍变量，刷新详情页切换正文接口,默认接口为0，若填写数字超出接口范围，会随机调用。\n当前接口: " + t[v] + "  共 "+r[v]+" 集"
cover = java.getString("class.module-item-pic.0@img@data-original") 

url = ""

JSON.stringify({
  name: name,
  author: author,
  kind: kind,
  lastchapter: lastchapter,
  intro: intro,
  cover: cover,
  url: url
})
</js>

ruleBookInfo.author: author
ruleBookInfo.init:
<js>
name = java.getString("h4@text")


author = java.getString("class.detail_imform_value.0@text") 


kind = java.getString("class.detail_imform_value.-1@text").replace("\/",",")


lastchapter = "" 


i = java.getString("class.detail_imform_desc_pre@html")


v = book.getVariable("custom") !="" ? book.getVariable("custom") : "0"


v = parseInt(v)


t = java.getStringList("#menu0@li@text")


Urls = java.getElements("#main0@div@ul"); 


if(v >= t.length || v < 0) { v = Math.floor(Math.random() * t.length); }


urls = Urls[v].select('li')


java.put("list", urls)


n = ""


for (o = 0; o < t.length; o++) {
  
  urls = Urls[o].select('li')

  f = "❤序号🔺" + o + "🔻【" + t[o] + "】 \n路线：" + t[o] + " \n最新章节：第" + urls.length + "集\n"
  n += f
}


usage = "\n📌使用说明： 根据序号设置书籍变量来切换来源(默认0)，若填写数字超出接口范围，会随机调用\n"


currentSource = "🎯当前源：序号🔺" + v + "🔻【" + t[v] + "】 (默认)\n"


intro = i + "\n" + usage + currentSource + n


cover = java.getString("class.blockcontent.0@img@src")

url = ""


JSON.stringify({
  name: name,
  author: author,
  kind: kind,
  lastchapter: lastchapter,
  intro: intro,
  cover: cover,
  url: url
})

</js>

ruleContent.content:
<js>
z = source.getVariable().split(",");
if(!(parseInt(z[0])>0)){
  let regex = /var c="([^"]*)"/;
let dd = result.match(regex)[1]

let j = java.base64Decode(dd);
  //java.log(j)
  jja=String(j).replace(/^[^-]*-/,"-")
  if(/=/.test(jja)){jj=jja.replace(/=[^=]*$/,"");}else{jj=jja.replace(/_[^_]*$/,"");}
  
m=jj.replace(/-/g,"PHA+").replace(/_/g,"8L3A+");
n=java.getString("@@#chaptercontent@p@html");
n+	java.base64Decode(m)

  
}else if(parseInt(z[0])){
  src=eval(String(source.bookSourceComment))
result=java.getString("id.chaptercontent@html",src)
result
}

</js>

ruleContent.content:
<js>
var JsDom = Packages.org.jsoup.Jsoup;
var Document = Packages.org.jsoup.nodes.Document;
var Element = Packages.org.jsoup.nodes.Element;
var TextNode = Packages.org.jsoup.nodes.TextNode;
var Node = Packages.org.jsoup.nodes.Node;


var document = JsDom.parse(src);

var result = [];

var postList = document.select("#postlist > div");

postList.forEach(function(post) {
   
    var postId = post.id();

    
    var author = post.select(".postinfo > a").text();

    
    var time = post.select(".authorinfo > em").text();

    
    var contentElement = post.select(".t_msgfont").first(); 
    if (contentElement) {
        
        contentElement.select("font, span").remove();

      
        var contentNodes = contentElement.childNodes();
        var content = "";
        contentNodes.forEach(function(node) {
            if (node instanceof TextNode) {
                content += node.getWholeText() + "\n"; 
            } else if (node instanceof Element) {
                
                if (node.tagName().equals("br")) {
                    content += "\n"; 
                } else {
                    content += node.text() + "\n"; 
                }
            }
        });
    } else {
        var content = ""; 
    }

    
    var item = {
        "data": "作者：" + author + " " + time + "\n" + content.trim(),
        "id": postId
    };

    
    result.push(item);
});


var mergedData = result.map(item => item.data).join("\n\n"); 

mergedData;
</js>

<js>
eval(String(source.loginUrl));
function explore(title, url, num, num_1, bool) {
    style = '{\n    title: "' + title + '",\n    url: "' + url + '",\n    style: {\n      layout_flexGrow: ' + num + ',\n      layout_flexBasisPercent: ' + num_1 + ',\n      layout_wrapBefore: ' + bool + '\n    }\n  }';
    return style;
}

var a = 0;
if(String(Account).length > 0) {
    if (!cookie.getCookie(Get('url')).includes('username')) {
        Login();
    }
    java.put("mw-sign", cache.get("mw-sign"));
    if(cache.get(java.md5Encode16(Get('url') + "Account_1")) && String(cache.get(java.md5Encode16(Get('url') + "Account_1"))).length > 0) { 
        cache.put(java.md5Encode16(Get('url') + "Account_1"), Account);
        java.put(java.md5Encode16(Get('url') + "Account_1"), Account);
        exploreUrl.push(explore('✣【' + Account + '】✣', '', 1, 1, false));
        var signdate = sign();
        cache.put("mw-sign", signdate);
        exploreUrl.push(explore(signdate + '✔️', '', 1, 0.25, false));
        exploreUrl.push(explore('我的收藏', `{{Get('url')}}/getfavors?page={{page-1}}&showOnlyUpdated=-1&isEnd=-1&isFullVersion=-1&order=0&order_type=0&folder_id=0`, 1, 0.25, false));
        exploreUrl.push(explore('浏览历史', `{{Get('url')}}/getHistory?page={{page-1}}&showOnlyUpdated=-1&isEnd=-1&isFullVersion=-1`, 1, 0.25, false));
        a = 4;
    }
}
Full = `{{get('full',Get('s'))}}`;
End = `{{get('end',Get('q'))}}`;
Host = `{{Get('p')}}`;
if(Get('t') > 0) {
    title = '✣　　　　　  ✣  标签  ✣  　　　　　✣';
    exploreUrl.push(explore(title, '', 1, 1, false));
    Gender = get('gender',Get('o'));
    Area = `{{get('area',Get('u'))}}`;

    var Url = Get('url') + '/booklist?gender=' + Gender;
    var html = java.ajax(Url);
    if(html.includes('html.js')){
        cookie.removeCookie(Get('url'));
        html = java.startBrowserAwait(Url,"验证").body();
    }
    var kind = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(html).select('.panel-tag');
    for (i in kind) {
        url = `{{Get('url')}}/booklist?tag=${kind[i].attr('data-val')}&gender=${Gender}${Full}${End}&area=${Area}&sort=${Sort}&img_host=${Host}&page={{page}}`;
    exploreUrl.push(explore(kind[i].text(), url, 1, 0.2, false));
    }
    BID = (kind.length % 4) < 1 ? 0 : (4 - (kind.length % 4));
    for (i = 0; i < BID; i++) {
       exploreUrl.push(explore('', '', 1, 0.2, false));

} else {
    title = [

        '&area=1&sort=1',
        '&area=1&sort=2'
    ];
    Gender = `{{get('gender',Get('o'))}}`;
    for (i in title) {
        url = `{{Get('url')}}/booklist?gender=${Gender}${Full}${End}${type[i]}&img_host=${Host}&page={{page}}`;
        exploreUrl.push(explore(title[i], url, 1, 0.2, false));
    }
    exploreUrl.splice(0+a, 0, explore('  ༺ˇ»`ʚ  　　  ✨韩国✨   　　 ɞ´«ˇ༻', '', 1, 1, false));

    exploreUrl.splice(25+a, 0, explore('  ༺ˇ»`ʚ  　　  ✨未分类✨ 　　   ɞ´«ˇ༻', '', 1, 1, false));
}

(function (e) {
    if (Get('search_TC') == true || e.indexOf('TC') > -1) {
        e = String(java.s2t(e)).replace(/TC/, '');
    }

    return Get('url') + '/search?keyword=' + e.replace(/\s.*$|\/.*$/g, '') + '&img_host=' + Get('p') + '&page={{page}}';
}(key));
</js>

bookSourceComment:
/*
version: 2025.0205
完善发现,添加搜索接口by河鹅和
优化搜索发现
目录乱序修复by折木
目录乱序修复可通过设置书籍变量来开启，默认关闭
发现添加最新入库，需要先登录构造本地数据
添加本地搜索，可通过构造的本地数据进行搜索，在搜索关键词前加上name:,id:,author:,tags:即可指定搜索类型，默认为搜索书名，例子：author:佚名
当前支持类型有author,category,id,intro,name,pornrate,score,status,tags,update,word,all，分别是搜索作者,分类,书ID,简介,书名,肉量,评分,状态,标签,更新,字数,全部
发现自动添加书籍到本地数据
本地搜索支持正则，例：id:^95[5-9]\d$、all:(白天|黑夜)
添加更多排序选择
添加设置每次并发数
2025.01.31 修改本地数据保存方法，不再保存到源变量
02.01 优化目录乱序修复
02.04 优化本地数据保存，将数据切分每50万个字符保存，数据网络导出最大为10M，超过10M请使用本地导出
02.05 优化生成发现方法
*/
api = [
`https://www.aaccnn.com/e/search/,{
  "body": "keyboard=${key}",
  "method": "POST"
}`,
`https://www.aahhss.com/e/search/,{
  "body": "keyboard=${key}",
  "method": "POST"
}`,
`https://www.aakkrr.com/book/${key}<,/${page}>`,
toDataUrl(key,page-1)]
v = String(checkData()['api'])
result = api[v.match(/^\d+$/)?v:2]
header: {"User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 8.0.0; MI 5s Plus Build/OPR1.170623.032; wv) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/4.0 Chrome/71.0.3578.99 Mobile Safari/537.36"}

ruleExplore.bookList:
<js>
booklist=[]
$=checkData()
if(baseUrl=="http://localhost/"){
	[key,page,sortType]=String(java.hexDecodeToString(result)).split("|==|")
if (/^(author|category|id|intro|name|pornrate|score|status|tags|update|word):/.test(key)){
		[type,key]=key.split(/:([\w\W]+)?/,2)
		}else{
			[key,page]=String(java.hexDecodeToString(result)).split("|==|")
			type="name"
			}
			books=$.books
	for (let i in books){
    books[i]["id"]=i
    booklist.push(books[i])
    }
    Regkey=createRegExp(key)
    booklist=booklist.filter(b=>String(b[type]).match(Regkey))
  
  if(/(pornrate|score|update|word)/.test($.sortType)||sortType){
  st=sortType||$.sortType
  booklist.sort((a,b)=>getSortValue(a,st)-getSortValue(b,st))
  	}
  if(!$.order){
  	booklist.reverse()
  	}
  if (booklist.length>0&&page==0)java.toast(`\n✅成功获取${booklist.length}本书籍`)
  else if((!booklist.length>0)&&page==0)java.toast("\n⚠️请先登录构造本地数据")
  booklist=getl(booklist,page);
	}else {
		result=java.getElements(".book-like a")
		count=0
		result.forEach(r=>{
			id=java.getString("href",r).match(/book\/(\d+)/)[1]
			temp={name:java.getString('h4@text',r),author:java.getString("span@text",r),cover:String(java.getString("img@src",r)).replace(/.*file\/cover\//,"")}
			if (!(id in $.books)){
				$.books[id]=Object.assign({},temp)
				count++
				}
			temp.id=id
			booklist.push(temp)
			})
		if (count>0){
			java.toast(`\n✅本地数据新增${count}本`)
			setv($)
			}
		}
JSON.stringify(booklist)
</js>
$[*]

ruleSearch.bookList:
<js>
java.log(baseUrl)
if(baseUrl=="http://localhost/"){
	[key, page, sortType] = String(java.hexDecodeToString(result)).split("|==|")
	if (/^(author|category|id|intro|name|pornrate|score|status|tags|update|word|all)[:]/.test(key)) {
		[type,key]=key.split(/:([\w\W]+)?/,2)
	} else {
		[key, page] = String(java.hexDecodeToString(result)).split("|==|")
		type="name"
	}
	$=checkData()
	books=$.books
	booklist=[]
	for (let i in books) {
		books[i]["id"]=i
		type == "all" ? Object.defineProperty(books[i], 'all', {
			get: function(){
				return JSON.stringify(this)
			}
		}) : ""
		booklist.push(books[i])
	}
	Regkey=createRegExp(key)
	booklist = booklist.filter(b => String(b[type]).match(Regkey))
	if(/(pornrate|score|update|word)/.test($.sortType)||sortType) {
		st = sortType || $.sortType
		booklist.sort((a, b) => getSortValue(a, st)-getSortValue(b, st))
	}
 if (!$.order) {
 	booklist.reverse()
 	}
 	if (booklist.length>0&&page==0) java.toast(`\n✅成功获取${booklist.length}本书籍\n当前为按${$.sortType=="pornrate"?"肉量":($.sortType=="score"?"评分":($.sortType=="word"?"字数":($.sortType=="update"?"更新":"ID")))}${$.order?"⬆️正":"⬇️倒"}序排列`)
 	else if ((!booklist.length>0)&&page==0) java.toast("\n❎本地数据未找到，请切换搜索接口")
 	booklist=getl(booklist,page);
 	java.setContent(JSON.stringify(booklist))
 	result=java.getElements("$[*]")
}else result=java.getElements(".book-like a||.grid-item")
</js>
ruleSearch.name: {{@h4@text||h3@text||""}}{{$.name||""}}

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
let e = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(result);
try{
	v = checkData()
	id=String(e.select('[property="og:novel:read_url"]').attr("content")).match(/book\/(\d+)/)[1]
	v.books[id]={author:e.select('[property="og:novel:author"]').attr("content"),category:Object.values(e.select(".categories a").textNodes()),cover:String(e.select('[property="og:image"]').attr("content")).replace(/.*file\/cover\//,""),intro:e.select('.book-desc').textNodes().toArray().join(""),name:e.select('[property="og:novel:book_name"]').attr("content"),pornrate:e.select('.pornrate dd').text(),score:Number(e.select('.score dd').text()),status:e.select('[property="og:novel:status"]').attr("content"),tags:Object.values(e.select('.tag a').textNodes()),update:String(e.select('.new dd').textNodes()[0]).trim(),word:e.select(".wordcount dd").text()}
	setv(v)
} catch(error) {
	java.log(error)
}
let chapters = e.select(".book-chapter a");
let chapterData = [];
let chapterNumber = 0;
if (book.getVariable("custom") != "") {
	   java.toast("\n✅目录乱序修复已开启")
	   chapters.forEach((item) => {
        let title = item.text()
        let chapterNumberMatch = title.match(/第(\d+)(-\d+)?章/);
        if (chapterNumberMatch) {
            chapterNumber = parseInt(chapterNumberMatch[1], 10);
        }
        chapterData.push({
            number: chapterNumber,
            text: title,
            href: item.attr("href")
        });
    });
    chapterData.sort((a, b) => a.number - b.number);
} else {
    chapterData = chapters
}
chapterData
</js>

bookSourceComment:
250101新增番茄来源
250203新增七猫来源
250204新增得间来源
250204新增QQ来源(仅支持免费小说)
250204新增熊猫看书
250210更新日志：
1.采用全新验证方式，之后未填写密钥，可以在阅读页登陆后刷新阅读页面即可！
2.搜索默认改为全局搜索，目前仅支持番茄，七猫，QQ，得间，熊猫，后面的按钮是预设，后期会添加相关来源
3.新增大灰狼书架功能，在登陆里面点击书架查看

下个版本预计更新内容：
1.预计发现页新增阅读记录和大灰狼书架栏目
2.预计新增阅读记录，阅读过的书籍可在大灰狼书架-阅读历史中查看
3.预计新增塔读小说，米读小说，小米阅读，猫眼看书，部分起点

250213更新日志:
新增塔读，69书吧，笔趣阁，喜马拉雅
新增大灰狼书架同步功能(书籍详情页刷新同步)

const groupDatas = [];
let infoData = [];
function deviceType() {
  try {
    return!!java.androidId();
  } catch (e) {
    return false;
  }
}
let device = deviceType()? 'android' : 'ios';
if (device == 'android' && (String(cookie.getCookie('fanqienovel.com') || java.getCookie('fanqienovel.com')))) {
    function groupQuery() {
        const url = base_url + "/group_name?cookie={{String(cookie.getCookie('fanqienovel.com') || java.getCookie('fanqienovel.com'))}}";
        const res = java.ajax(url);
        const data = JSON.parse(res).data;

        data.forEach(group => {
            let key;
            for (key in group) {
                groupDatas.push({
                    "title": key,
                    "url": base_url +"/bookshelf2?page={{page}}&book_ids=" + group[key].join(","),
                    "style": {
                        "layout_flexGrow": 1,
                        "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.45
                    }
                });

	let headers={'app-version':'51110','platform':'android','reg':'0','AUTHORIZATION':'','application-id':'com.****.reader','net-env':'1','channel':'unknown','qm-params':''}
	sign_key='d3dGiJc651gSQ8w1'

params={'id':{{$.book_id}}, 'imei_ip':'2937357107','teeny_mode':0}

var urlEncode = function (param, key, encode) {  
  if(param==null) return '';  
  var paramStr = '';  
  var t = typeof (param);  
  if (t == 'string' || t == 'number' || t == 'boolean') {  
    paramStr += '&' + key + '=' + ((encode==null||encode) ? encodeURIComponent(param) : param);  
  } else {  
    for (var i in param) {  
      var k = key == null ? i : key + (param instanceof Array ? '[' + i + ']' : '.' + i);  
      paramStr += urlEncode(param[i], k, encode);  
    }  
  }  
  return paramStr;  
};
paramSign=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+params[n],'')+sign_key));
headerSign=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(headers).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+headers[n],'')+sign_key))
params['sign']=paramSign;

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
var Jsoup = Packages.org.jsoup.Jsoup;
var Document = Packages.org.jsoup.nodes.Document;
var Element = Packages.org.jsoup.nodes.Element;
var Elements = Packages.org.jsoup.select.Elements;
var document = Jsoup.parse(src);
var volMap = {};
var tabs = document.select(".buttons-tab a");
for (var i = 0; i < tabs.size(); i++) {
    var element = tabs.get(i);
    var text = element.text();
    var href = element.attr("href").substring(1);  
    volMap[href] = text;
}
var result = [];
var tabsDiv = document.select(".tabs .tab");
var z = source.getVariable(); // 获取用户变量
java.log(z)
for (var i = 0; i < tabsDiv.size(); i++) {
    var tab = tabsDiv.get(i);
    var tabId = tab.id();  
    var vol = volMap[tabId];  

    var items = tab.select("ul li .item-link");
    var tempItems = [];  

    for (var j = 0; j < items.size(); j++) {
        var item = items.get(j);
        var link = item.select("a").first();
        var text = link.text().trim();
        var href = link.attr("href");
        tempItems.push({ text: text, url: href, vol: vol });
    }

    // 根据变量z判断排序方式
    if (z == "目录乱序") {
        // 按数字升序排序
        tempItems.sort(function(a, b) {
            var numA = (a.text.match(/\d+/) || [0])[0];
            var numB = (b.text.match(/\d+/) || [0])[0];
            return parseInt(numA, 10) - parseInt(numB, 10);
        });
    } else {
        // 默认倒序
        tempItems.reverse();
    }

    result = result.concat(tempItems);
}

result;

</js>

exploreUrl:
<js>
function setArgument(key, value) {
    let open_argument = source.getVariable();
    open_argument = getArguments(open_argument,'');
    open_argument[key] = value;
    open_argument = JSON.stringify(open_argument);
    source.setVariable(open_argument);
    return open_argument;
}

function gets_key() {
    var servers = String(source.bookSourceUrl);
    const serverList = servers.split('\n');
    
    for (let server of serverList) {
        let keys = String(cookie.getCookie(server)) || String(java.getCookie(server));
        if (keys) {
            let keyParts = keys.split('secretKey=');
            if (keyParts.length > 1) {
                keys = keyParts[keyParts.length - 1];
                setArgument('key', keys);
                return keys;
            }
        }
    }
    return '';  
 }

let open_argument = source.getVariable();
let base_url = getArguments(open_argument,'server');
let ms = getArguments(open_argument,'tone_id');
let key = getArguments(open_argument,'key');
if (!key) {
	key = gets_key();
	}

const groupDatas = [];
let infoData = [];
function deviceType() {
  try {
    return!!java.androidId();
  } catch (e) {
    return false;
  }
}
let device = deviceType()? 'android' : 'ios';
if (device == 'android' && (get_key(String(cookie.getCookie('fanqienovel.com') || java.getCookie('fanqienovel.com'))))) {
    function groupQuery() {
        const url = base_url + "/group_name?cookie={{get_key(String(cookie.getCookie('fanqienovel.com') || java.getCookie('fanqienovel.com')))}}";
        const res = java.ajax(url);
        const data = JSON.parse(res).data;

        data.forEach(group => {
            let key;
            for (key in group) {
                groupDatas.push({
                    "title": key,
                    "url": base_url +"/bookshelf2?page={{page}}&book_ids=" + group[key].join(","),
                    "style": {
                        "layout_flexGrow": 1,
                        "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.45
                    }
                });
            }
        });

        if (groupDatas.length % 2 !== 0) {
            groupDatas.push({
                "title": "--",
                "url": "",
                "style": {
                    "layout_flexGrow": 1,
                    "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.45
                }
            });
        }
    }

    try {
    	java.longToast("请稍等,正在更新分组数据!");
    // 用户信息
    const userUrl = base_url + '/fquser?sessionid={{String(cookie.getKey("fanqienovel.com", "sessionid"))}}';
    const userRes = java.ajax(userUrl);
    const userInfo = JSON.parse(userRes).data.name;

    infoData = [
        {
            "title": `${userInfo}个人中心`,
            "url": "",
            "style": {
                "layout_flexGrow": 1,
                "layout_flexBasisPercent": 1
            }
        }
    ];
    groupQuery();
    } catch (e) {
    java.longToast("网络错误或登录失效或阅读版本过低，请重新登录番茄重试！");
    }

}

// 合并数据

<js>
eval(String(source.loginUrl));
var exploreUrl = [];
title = '✣　　　　　  ✣  榜　　单  ✣  　　　　　✣';
exploreUrl.push(explore(title, '', 1, 1, false));
title = [
    '最近更新',
    '连载漫画',
    '完结漫画'
];
type = [
    '/update/d30.html',
    '/list/lianzai/index_p{{page}}.html',
    '/list/wanjie/index_p{{page}}.html'
];
for (i in title) {
    url = `{{Get('url')}}${type[i]}`;
    exploreUrl.push(explore(title[i], url, 1, 0.25, false));
}
title = [
    '日排行',
    '周排行',
    '月排行',
    '总排行'
];
rank = [
    '/rank/',
    '/rank/week.html',
    '/rank/month.html',
    '/rank/total.html'
];
for (i in title) {
    url = `{{Get('url')}}${rank[i]}`;
    exploreUrl.push(explore(title[i], url, 1, 0.2, false));
}
title = '✣　　　　　  ✣  标　　签  ✣  　　　　　✣';
exploreUrl.push(explore(title, '', 1, 1, false));
var Url = Get('url') + '/list/';
var J = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(java.ajax(Url));
var list = J.select('.genre') ? J.select('.genre').select('li') : [];
O1 = `\${get('o1',Get('o'))}`;
P1 = `\${get('p1',Get('p'))}`;
Q1 = `\${get('q1',Get('q'))}`;
R1 = `{{get('r1',Get('r'))}}`;
S1 = `\${get('s1',Get('s'))}`;
T1 = `\${get('t1',Get('s'))}`;
for (i in list) {
    var kind = String(list[i].select('a').attr('href')).replace(/\/list\/|\/$/g, '');
    var Filter = `{{String(\`${P1}_${kind}_${O1}_${T1}_${S1}_${Q1}/\`).replace(/_+/g,'_').replace(/_\\//g,'\/').replace(/^_|^\\//g,'')}}`;
    url = `{{Get('url')}}/list/${Filter}${R1}_p{{page}}.html`;
    exploreUrl.push(explore(list[i].text(), url, 1, 0.25, false));
}
BID = (kind % 3) < 1 ? 0 : (3 - (kind % 3));
for (i = 0; i < BID; i++) {
   exploreUrl.push(explore('', '', 1, 0.25, false)); 
}
JSON.stringify(exploreUrl);
</js>
header:
<js>
var Proxy = Map('代理：').split(",");
headers={
    "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/127.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Edg/127.0.0.0",
    "proxy": Proxy.some(value => parseInt(value, 10) == parseInt(Get('ci0'), 10)) ? '' : Proxy[0],
}
cache.put(java.md5Encode16(Get('url') + "headers"),JSON.stringify(headers));
JSON.stringify(headers);
</js>

var data = [];
var Headers = JSON.parse(cache.get(java.md5Encode16(Get('url') + "headers")).replace(Get('url'), baseUrl));

    "method": "GET",
    "headers": Headers
};
User = Checkwait(User);
if (User == true) {
    if (baseUrl.includes('/d30')) {
        var list =  java.getElements('.latest-list li');
        for (i in list) {
            name = list[i].select('.ell').text();
            kind = /"sl"/.test(list[i]) ? '连载' : '完结';
            latest = String(list[i].select('.tt').text()).replace(/更新至|^共/, '') + String('〔' + String(list[i].select('.dt').text()) + '〕').replace(/〔〕/, '');
            data.push({

                'author': '',
                'kind': kind,
                'word': '',
                'latest': latest,
                'intro': '',
                'cover': String(list[i].select('.ell a').attr('href')).replace(/\/comic/, 'https:////cf.mhgui.com/cpic/b').replace(/\/$/, '.jpg'),
                'url': Get('url') + list[i].select('.ell a').attr('href')
            });
        }
        Data();
    }
    if (baseUrl.includes('/rank/')) {
        var list =  java.getElements('tbody tr');
        for (i in list) {
            name = list[i].select('h5').text();
            author = list[i].select('.rank-author').text();
            kind = list[i].select('.rank-score').text() + ',' + list[i].select('.cRed').text() + ',NO:' + list[i].select('.rank-no').text() + ',' + (/"trend-up"/.test(list[i]) ? '🔺' : '🔻');
            latest = String(list[i].select('.rank-update').text()) + String('〔' + String(list[i].select('.rank-time').text()) + '〕').replace(/〔〕/, '');
            data.push({
                'name': name,
                'author': author,
                'kind': kind,
                'word': '',
                'latest': latest,
                'intro': '',
                'cover': String(list[i].select('h5 a').attr('href')).replace(/\/comic/, 'https:////cf.mhgui.com/cpic/b').replace(/\/$/, '.jpg'),
                'url': Get('url') + list[i].select('h5 a').attr('href')
            });
        }
        Data();
    }
    if (baseUrl.includes('/list/')) {
        var list =  java.getElements('#contList li');
        for (i in list) {
            name = list[i].select('.ell').text();
            kind = list[i].select('.updateon em').text() + ',' + (/"sl"/.test(list[i]) ? '连载' : '完结');
            latest = String(list[i].select('.tt').text()).replace(/更新至|^共/, '') + String('〔' + String(list[i].select('.updateon').text()).replace(/更新于：/, '').replace(/(\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}).*/, '$1') + '〕').replace(/〔〕/, '');
            data.push({
                'name': name,
                'author': '',
                'kind': kind,
                'word': '',
                'latest': latest,
                'intro': '',
                'cover': String(list[i].select('.ell a').attr('href')).replace(/\/comic/, 'https:////cf.mhgui.com/cpic/b').replace(/\/$/, '.jpg'),
                'url': Get('url') + list[i].select('.ell a').attr('href')
            });
        }
        var next = java.ajax(baseUrl.replace(/_p(\d+)/, function(match, p1) {return '_p' + (parseInt(p1) + 1);}) + ',' + JSON.stringify(Option));
        var next_1 = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(next);
        if (!list[0] || next_1.select('#contList li')[0]) {
            Data();
        }
    }
    data = JSON.stringify(data);
} else {
    data = Data();
}
Put(data);

@js:
list=[]
$=result
for(i in $){
if(String($[i]).match(/class="volume/)){
	t=String($[i].text()).replace(new RegExp(book.name,''),'');
		list.push({
				text: "🏮〖"+t+"〗🏮",
				volume: true
			})
	}
else{
		$[i].select("a").forEach(a=>{
				list.push({
						text: a.text(),
						href: a.attr("href")
					})
			})
	}
}
list

<js>
function fq_last() {
	let url = `https://api5-normal-sinfonlineb.fqnovel.com/reading/bookapi/multi-detail/v/?aid=1967&iid=1&version_code=999&book_id={{$.book_id}}`;
        let last =JSON.parse(java.ajax(url)).data[0]; 
        return last["last_chapter_title"]+" · "+java.timeFormat(last["last_chapter_update_time"]*1000);
	
	}

	
function qm_last() {
	let headers={'app-version':'51110','platform':'android','reg':'0','AUTHORIZATION':'','application-id':'com.****.reader','net-env':'1','channel':'unknown','qm-params':''}
	sign_key='d3dGiJc651gSQ8w1'

params={'id':{{$.book_id}}, 'imei_ip':'2937357107','teeny_mode':0}

var urlEncode = function (param, key, encode) {  
  if(param==null) return '';  
  var paramStr = '';  
  var t = typeof (param);  
  if (t == 'string' || t == 'number' || t == 'boolean') {  
    paramStr += '&' + key + '=' + ((encode==null||encode) ? encodeURIComponent(param) : param);  
  } else {  
    for (var i in param) {  
      var k = key == null ? i : key + (param instanceof Array ? '[' + i + ']' : '.' + i);  
      paramStr += urlEncode(param[i], k, encode);  
    }  
  }  
  return paramStr;  
};
paramSign=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+params[n],'')+sign_key));
headerSign=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(headers).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+headers[n],'')+sign_key))
params['sign']=paramSign;
headers['sign']=headerSign;
let url = "https://api-bc.wtzw.com/api/v4/book/detail?"+urlEncode(params);
option = {'headers':headers};
let last =JSON.parse(java.ajax(url+','+JSON.stringify(option)))["data"]["book"];
let last2 =  `${last["latest_chapter_title"]} · ${java.timeFormat(last['update_time']*1000)} `
	return last2
	}
	
if ('{{$.source}}'=='番茄'){
	'番茄:'+fq_last();
	} else if ('{{$.source}}'=='七猫'){
	'七猫:'+qm_last();
	} else {
		'{{$.source}}'
		}

</js>

bookSourceComment:
250101新增番茄来源
250203新增七猫来源
250204新增得间来源
250204新增QQ来源(仅支持免费小说)
250204新增熊猫看书
250210更新日志：
1.采用全新验证方式，之后未填写密钥，可以在阅读页登陆后刷新阅读页面即可！
2.搜索默认改为全局搜索，目前仅支持番茄，七猫，QQ，得间，熊猫，后面的按钮是预设，后期会添加相关来源
3.新增大灰狼书架功能，在登陆里面点击书架查看

ruleSearch.bookList:
<js>
function loading(){
var su=source.getKey(),
sk=java.get("sk"),
q="?q="+java.encodeURI(sk);

var c="Hm_lvt_="+~~(Date.now()/1e3);
var head={
	accept: "application/json",
	"accept-language": "zh-CN,en-US;q=0.9",
	referer: baseUrl,
	cookie: String(c)
};

var hm=";hm="+java.head(su+"/user/hm.html"+q,head).cookies().hm;
head.cookie = String(head.cookie+hm);

var get=java.get(su+"/user/search.html"+q, head).body();

var j=JSON.parse(get),
m=j.map(_=>JSON.stringify(_));

var b=[],
v=source.getVariable();
//条件判断，存在不为空和0，且小于长度
if(v&&v!=""&&v!=0&&v<m.length){
	for(i=0;i<=v-1;i++){
		b.push(m[i])
		}
	m=b;
	}else{m=m}
//返回列表
return m
}
//当前url包含json为发现，直接返回结果
m=/json/.test(baseUrl)?result:loading();
//不包含json为搜索，进行搜索加载
m
</js>
$.*
ruleSearch.name: $.articlename

variableComment:
输入数字设置搜索列表数量，过大无效。
1为1个，2为2个，3为3个，以此类推。
不设置或0清空显示全部列表。

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>var JsDom = Packages.org.jsoup.Jsoup;
var Document = Packages.org.jsoup.nodes.Document;
var Element = Packages.org.jsoup.nodes.Element;


var document = JsDom.parse(src);

var result = [];

var sections = document.select(".catalog-container > .catalog-section");
sections.forEach(function(section) {
    var vol = section.select(".catalog-section-title").text();
    var articles = section.select(".article-list > .article-item > .article-title > a");
    articles.forEach(function(article) {
        var url = article.attr("href");
        var text = article.text();
        result.push({
            "url": url,
            "text": text,
            "vol": vol
        });
    });
});

result;
</js>

ruleContent.nextContentUrl:
<js>
(function(){
    // 使用正则检测分页标签
    const hasNextLink = /<a\s+rel=\"next\"\s+class=\"next\"[^>]*>下—页<\/a>/i.test(result);
    if (!hasNextLink) return '';
    
    try {
        // 动态生成分页URL（适配数字型URL）
        let url = baseUrl;
        const pageMatch = url.match(/(\d+)(?:_(\d+))?\.html$/);
        if (!pageMatch) return '';
        
        const [_, baseId, currentPage] = pageMatch;
        const pageNum = currentPage ? parseInt(currentPage) : 1;
        
        // 安全限制（最大3页）
        if (pageNum > 2) return ''; // 第3页后停止
        
        // 生成新URL（如 /123_2.html → /123_3.html）
        return url.replace(/(\d+)(?:_(\d+))?\.html$/, `${baseId}_${pageNum + 1}.html`);
    } catch(e) {
        return '';
    }
})()
</js>

const groupDatas = [];
let infoData = [];
function deviceType() {
  try {
    return!!java.androidId();
  } catch (e) {
    return false;
  }
}
let device = deviceType()? 'android' : 'ios';
if (device == 'android' && (String(cookie.getCookie('fanqienovel.com') || java.getCookie('fanqienovel.com')))) {
    function groupQuery() {
        const url = base_url + "/group_name?cookie={{String(cookie.getCookie('fanqienovel.com') || java.getCookie('fanqienovel.com'))}}";
        const res = java.ajax(url);
        const data = JSON.parse(res).data;

        data.forEach(group => {
            let key;
            for (key in group) {
                groupDatas.push({
                    "title": key,

    ];
    groupQuery();

    }

}

function qm_last() {
	let headers={'app-version':'51110','platform':'android','reg':'0','AUTHORIZATION':'','application-id':'com.****.reader','net-env':'1','channel':'unknown','qm-params':''}
	sign_key='d3dGiJc651gSQ8w1'

params={'id':{{$.book_id}}, 'imei_ip':'2937357107','teeny_mode':0}

var urlEncode = function (param, key, encode) {  
  if(param==null) return '';  
  var paramStr = '';  
  var t = typeof (param);  
  if (t == 'string' || t == 'number' || t == 'boolean') {  
    paramStr += '&' + key + '=' + ((encode==null||encode) ? encodeURIComponent(param) : param);  
  } else {  
    for (var i in param) {  
      var k = key == null ? i : key + (param instanceof Array ? '[' + i + ']' : '.' + i);  
      paramStr += urlEncode(param[i], k, encode);  
    }  
  }  
  return paramStr;  
};
paramSign=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+params[n],'')+sign_key));
headerSign=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(headers).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+headers[n],'')+sign_key))
params['sign']=paramSign;
headers['sign']=headerSign;
let url = "https://api-bc.wtzw.com/api/v4/book/detail?"+urlEncode(params);
option = {'headers':headers};
let last =JSON.parse(java.ajax(url+','+JSON.stringify(option)))["data"]["book"];
let last2 =  `${last["latest_chapter_title"]} · ${java.timeFormat(last['update_time']*1000)} `
	return last2
	}
	
if ('{{$.source}}'=='番茄'){
	'番茄:'+fq_last();
	} else if ('{{$.source}}'=='七猫'){
	'七猫:'+qm_last();

		'{{$.source}}'
		}

<js>
function fq_last() {
	let url = `https://api5-normal-sinfonlineb.fqnovel.com/reading/bookapi/multi-detail/v/?aid=1967&iid=1&version_code=999&book_id={{$.book_id}}`;
        let last =JSON.parse(java.ajax(url)).data[0]; 
        return last["last_chapter_title"]+" · "+java.timeFormat(last["last_chapter_update_time"]*1000);
	
	}

	
function qm_last() {
	let headers={'app-version':'51110','platform':'android','reg':'0','AUTHORIZATION':'','application-id':'com.****.reader','net-env':'1','channel':'unknown','qm-params':''}
	sign_key='d3dGiJc651gSQ8w1'

params={'id':{{$.book_id}}, 'imei_ip':'2937357107','teeny_mode':0}

var urlEncode = function (param, key, encode) {  
  if(param==null) return '';  
  var paramStr = '';  
  var t = typeof (param);  
  if (t == 'string' || t == 'number' || t == 'boolean') {  
    paramStr += '&' + key + '=' + ((encode==null||encode) ? encodeURIComponent(param) : param);  
  } else {  
    for (var i in param) {  
      var k = key == null ? i : key + (param instanceof Array ? '[' + i + ']' : '.' + i);  
      paramStr += urlEncode(param[i], k, encode);  
    }  
  }  
  return paramStr;  
};
paramSign=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+params[n],'')+sign_key));
headerSign=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(headers).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+headers[n],'')+sign_key))
params['sign']=paramSign;
headers['sign']=headerSign;
let url = "https://api-bc.wtzw.com/api/v4/book/detail?"+urlEncode(params);
option = {'headers':headers};
let last =JSON.parse(java.ajax(url+','+JSON.stringify(option)))["data"]["book"];
let last2 =  `${last["latest_chapter_title"]} · ${java.timeFormat(last['update_time']*1000)} `
	return last2
	}
	
if ('{{$.source}}'=='番茄'){
	'番茄:'+fq_last();
	} else if ('{{$.source}}'=='七猫'){
	'七猫:'+qm_last();
	} else {
		'{{$.source}}'
		}

</js>

const groupDatas = [];
let infoData = [];
function deviceType() {
  try {
    return!!java.androidId();
  } catch (e) {
    return false;
  }
}
let device = deviceType()? 'android' : 'ios';
if (device == 'android' && (String(cookie.getCookie('fanqienovel.com') || java.getCookie('fanqienovel.com')))) {
    function groupQuery() {
        const url = base_url + "/group_name?cookie={{String(cookie.getCookie('fanqienovel.com') || java.getCookie('fanqienovel.com'))}}";
        const res = java.ajax(url);
        const data = JSON.parse(res).data;

        data.forEach(group => {
            let key;
            for (key in group) {
                groupDatas.push({
                    "title": key,
                    "url": base_url +"/bookshelf2?page={{page}}&book_ids=" + group[key].join(","),
                    "style": {
                        "layout_flexGrow": 1,
                        "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.45
                    }
                });
            }
        });

        if (groupDatas.length % 2 !== 0) {
            groupDatas.push({
                "title": "--",
                "url": "",
                "style": {
                    "layout_flexGrow": 1,
                    "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.45
                }
            });
        }
    }

    try {

	let headers={'app-version':'51110','platform':'android','reg':'0','AUTHORIZATION':'','application-id':'com.****.reader','net-env':'1','channel':'unknown','qm-params':''}
	sign_key='d3dGiJc651gSQ8w1'

params={'id':{{$.book_id}}, 'imei_ip':'2937357107','teeny_mode':0}

var urlEncode = function (param, key, encode) {  
  if(param==null) return '';  
  var paramStr = '';  
  var t = typeof (param);  
  if (t == 'string' || t == 'number' || t == 'boolean') {  
    paramStr += '&' + key + '=' + ((encode==null||encode) ? encodeURIComponent(param) : param);  
  } else {  
    for (var i in param) {  
      var k = key == null ? i : key + (param instanceof Array ? '[' + i + ']' : '.' + i);  
      paramStr += urlEncode(param[i], k, encode);  
    }  
  }  
  return paramStr;  
};
paramSign=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+params[n],'')+sign_key));
headerSign=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(headers).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+headers[n],'')+sign_key))
params['sign']=paramSign;
headers['sign']=headerSign;
let url = "https://api-bc.wtzw.com/api/v4/book/detail?"+urlEncode(params);
option = {'headers':headers};
let last =JSON.parse(java.ajax(url+','+JSON.stringify(option)))["data"]["book"];

    function groupQuery() {
        const url = base_url + "/group_name?cookie={{String(cookie.getCookie('fanqienovel.com') || java.getCookie('fanqienovel.com'))}}";
        const res = java.ajax(url);

        data.forEach(group => {
            let key;

                groupDatas.push({
                    "title": key,

                    "style": {
                        "layout_flexGrow": 1,
                        "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.45

            }
        });

                "title": "--",
                "url": "",
                "style": {
                    "layout_flexGrow": 1,
                    "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.45

🗂当前模式：${tab}\n`
if (tab =='听书') {info = info+	'🔊当前音色：'+ getArguments(source.getVariable(),'tone_id',String(source.bookSourceComment))+'\n'+book_tts+'\n‎';}
if (`${tags}`) {info = info +  `🕹分类：${tags}\n`};
if (`${role}`) {info = info +  `🎗书籍主角：${role}\n`};
if (`${last_chapter_title}`) {info = info +  `🎯最新章节：${last_chapter_title}\n`};
if (`${last_chapter_update_time}`) {info = info +  `⏳更新时间：${last_chapter_update_time}\n`};
if (`${word_number}`) {info = info +  `📝书籍字数：${word_number}\n`};
if (`${status}`) {info = info +  `💥书籍状态：${status}\n`};
if (`${score}`) {info = info +  `✨书籍评分：${score}\n`};
if (`${media}`) {info = info +  `📌出版媒体：${media}\n`};
if (`${abstract}`) {info = info +  `‎
📚书籍简介：
${abstract}\n`};
if (`${book_review}`) {info = info +  `‎\n${book_review}\n`};
if (`${copyright_info}`) {info = info +  `📍${copyright_info}`};
</js>

let sources = res[3];

let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(),'server',String(source.bookSourceComment));
let key = '';
try {
	key = String(cookie.getCookie(base_url)) || String(java.getCookie(base_url));
	key = getKey(key);
 } catch (e) {key='';}
        
        
let device,device_type;
try {
    device = java.androidId();
    device_type='安卓';
} catch (e) {
    try{
device = java.deviceID();
device_type='苹果';
}catch (e) {device = '';
device_type='安卓';
}
}


let content_url;
if (tab=='小说') {
	content_url= `/content?item_id=${item_id}&device=${device}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&key=${key}`;
 } 
 else if (tab=='听书') {
 	 	content_url= `/audio?item_id=${item_id}&device=${device}&tone_id=${tone_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&key=${key}`;
 	} else if (tab=='漫画') {
 		 	content_url=	`/pic?item_id=${item_id}&device=${device}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&key=${key}`;
 		} else if (tab=='短剧') {
 		content_url=	`/video?item_id=${item_id}&device=${device}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&key=${key}`;
 			}
 let data = java.ajax(base_url+content_url);
 try {
if (JSON.parse(data).msg) {
	java.toast(JSON.parse(data).msg);
	}}catch (e) {}
let content = JSON.parse(data).content;
if (device_type=='安卓' && tab  == '短剧'){
	data = {'content':`【右上角刷新】开启播放(下一集请切换下一章刷新)\n播放直链：\n${content}`}
	data = JSON.stringify(data);
	 if (book.durChapterIndex===chapter.index){

	// let dataUrl = `data:text/html;base64,${b64}`;
	// 	java.startBrowser(dataUrl,title);
	 	java.startBrowser(content,title);
	 	java.toast('正在加载视频...');
	}};

data;
</js>

function qm_last() {
	let headers={'app-version':'51110','platform':'android','reg':'0','AUTHORIZATION':'','application-id':'com.****.reader','net-env':'1','channel':'unknown','qm-params':''}
	sign_key='d3dGiJc651gSQ8w1'

params={'id':{{$.book_id}}, 'imei_ip':'2937357107','teeny_mode':0}

var urlEncode = function (param, key, encode) {  
  if(param==null) return '';  
  var paramStr = '';  
  var t = typeof (param);  
  if (t == 'string' || t == 'number' || t == 'boolean') {  
    paramStr += '&' + key + '=' + ((encode==null||encode) ? encodeURIComponent(param) : param);  
  } else {  
    for (var i in param) {  
      var k = key == null ? i : key + (param instanceof Array ? '[' + i + ']' : '.' + i);  
      paramStr += urlEncode(param[i], k, encode);  
    }  
  }  
  return paramStr;  
};
paramSign=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+params[n],'')+sign_key));
headerSign=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(headers).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+headers[n],'')+sign_key))
params['sign']=paramSign;
headers['sign']=headerSign;
let url = "https://api-bc.wtzw.com/api/v4/book/detail?"+urlEncode(params);
option = {'headers':headers};
let last =JSON.parse(java.ajax(url+','+JSON.stringify(option)))["data"]["book"];
let last2 =  `${last["latest_chapter_title"]} · ${java.timeFormat(last['update_time']*1000)} `
	return last2

    b = b.split(','); 
}
//java.log(nextChapterUrl)

results = [];

        currentPage = parseInt(b[i]);

            continue;
        }
        if (currentPage > c) {
            break;
        }
        if (currentPage > hia && currentPage < c) {
            url = baseUrl.replace(/(pageStart=)\d+/, '$1' + currentPage);
            results.push(url);
        }
    }results

        const url = base_url + "/group_name?cookie={{get_key(String(cookie.getCookie('fanqienovel.com') || java.getCookie('fanqienovel.com')))}}";

            let key;

                groupDatas.push({
                    "title": key,

                    "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.45

                "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.27
            }
        });
            }
}



JSON.stringify(datas);
</js>

ruleBookInfo.tocUrl:
<js>
url=baseUrl.replace(/book/,'chapter');
m=java.ajax(url);
re=String(m).match(/[\s\S]*data-p.*?(\d+)[\s\S]*?\/ul>/)[1]
java.put("m",re)
if(baseUrl.match(/fanqxsw/)){
	java.getString('text.章节目录@href')
	}else if (baseUrl.match(/kanshudashi/)){		a=baseUrl.match(/book\/(.*?)\./)[1];
b=`https://www.kanshudashi.com/index.php?action=loadChapterPage,{"method":"post","body": "id=${a}&page=1"}`;
}else if (baseUrl.match(/kelexs/)){
		a=baseUrl.match(/book\/(.*?)\./)[1];
b=`https://www.kelexs.com/index.php?action=loadChapterPage,{"method":"post","body": "id=${a}&page=1"}`;
}
</js>

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
if(baseUrl.match(/kele/)){
	result=java.getElements("$.data[*]")
	}else{
if(String(result).match(/\<a\>/)){
	result=java.getElements("class.list font18 chapListBody@ul@li@a")
	}else{
		result=java.getElements("$.data[*]")
		}
}
		//java.log(result)
		result
</js>
ruleToc.nextTocUrl:
<js>
m=java.get("m");
if(baseUrl.match(/fanqx/)){
var a = baseUrl.match(/\/chapter\/(.*?)\.html/);
//java.log(a[1]);
let hrefList = [];
if (a) {
  var b = result.match(/data\-p\="\d+"/g).length;
  if (b) {
    for(let i = 1; i <= b; i++) {
      let href = `https://www.fanqxsw.com/index.php?action=loadChapterPage,{"body":"id=${a[1]}&page=${i}","method":"POST"}`;
     //java.log(href);
      hrefList.push(href);
    }
    hrefList
     }
}
}else {
list=[]
if(JSON.parse(result).data.length>0){
	for (i = 2; i <= m; i++){
	list.push(baseUrl.replace(/page=(\d+)/,'page=' +i))
		}
		list
	}
	}

</js>

exploreUrl:
<js>
discover = [];
push = (title, url, style) => discover.push({ title: title, url: url, style: { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: style } });
addSlots = (count, style) => {
    remainder = count % 3;
    slotsAdd = remainder === 0 ? 0 : 3 - remainder;
    for (i = 0; i < slotsAdd; i++) {
        push("", null, style);
    }
};
push("收藏夹", null, 1);
try {
    favored = java.ajax(`${baseUrl}/api/user/favored`);
    if (favored.includes("Token不合法或者过期")) {
        push("账号未登录", null, 0.25);
        addSlots(1, 0.25);
    } else {
        favoredData = JSON.parse(favored).favoredWeb;
        favoredData.forEach(item => {
            push(item.title, `/api/user/favored-web/${item.id}?page={{(page-1)}}&pageSize=30&sort=update`, 0.25);
        });
        addSlots(favoredData.length, 0.25);
    }
} catch (e) {
    push("未知错误", null, 0.25);
    addSlots(1, 0.25);
};
push("来源", null, 1);
providers = ["全部", "kakuyomu", "syosetu", "novelup", "hameln", "pixiv", "alphapolis"];
providers.forEach(provider => {
    url = provider === "全部" ? 
        `/api/novel?page={{(page-1)}}&pageSize=20&query=&provider=${providers.slice(1).join('%2C')}&type=0&level=0&translate=0&sort=0` : 
        `/api/novel?page={{(page-1)}}&pageSize=20&query=&provider=${provider}&type=0&level=0&translate=0&sort=0`;
    push(provider, url, 0.25);
});
addSlots(providers.length, 0.25);
push("类型", null, 1);
types = ["全部", "连载中", "已完结", "短篇"];
types.forEach((type, index) => {
    url = `/api/novel?page={{(page-1)}}&pageSize=20&query=&provider=kakuyomu%2Csyosetu%2Cnovelup%2Chameln%2Cpixiv%2Calphapolis&type=${index}&level=0&translate=0&sort=0`;
    push(type, url, 0.25);
});
addSlots(types.length, 0.25);
push("排序", null, 1);
sorts = ["更新", "点击"];
sorts.forEach((sort, index) => {
    url = `/api/novel?page={{(page-1)}}&pageSize=20&query=&provider=kakuyomu%2Csyosetu%2Cnovelup%2Chameln%2Cpixiv%2Calphapolis&type=0&level=0&translate=0&sort=${index}`;
    push(sort, url, 0.25);
});
addSlots(sorts.length, 0.25);
JSON.stringify(discover);
</js>
header:
<js>
header = {
    "Referer": baseUrl
};
JSON.stringify(header);
</js>
loginUrl:
<js>
function login() {
    username = source.getLoginInfoMap().get("账号");
    password = source.getLoginInfoMap().get("密码");
    url = `${baseUrl}/api/auth/sign-in`;
    body = JSON.stringify({
        emailOrUsername: username,
        password: password
    });
    headers = {
        "Content-Type": "application/json"
    };
    response = java.post(url, body, headers);
    responseBody = response.body();
    authorizationObject = {
        Authorization: `Bearer ${responseBody}`
    };
    header = JSON.stringify(authorizationObject);
    source.putLoginHeader(header);
}
login();
</js>

ruleBookInfo.author: authors..name
ruleBookInfo.init:
<js>
initUrl = book.bookUrl;
url = initUrl.includes('api/novel') ? initUrl : initUrl.replace('novel', 'api/novel');
body = initUrl.includes('api/novel') ? result : java.ajax(url);
if (body.includes('ID不合适，应当使用')) {
    match = body.match(/\/\w+\/[\w-]+/);
    url = `${book.origin}/api/novel${match}`;
    body = java.ajax(url);
}
if (body.includes("Token不合法或者过期")) {
    java.toast("当前会话已失效，请重新登录");
}
java.put('url', url);
body
</js>
ruleBookInfo.intro:
<js>
value = String(book.getVariable("custom")) || String(source.getVariable());
result = JSON.parse(result);
intro = ['5', '8', '9'].includes(value) ? result.introductionJp : result.introductionZh || result.introductionJp;
timeStamp = '{{$.toc[-1].createAt}}' || '{{$.syncAt}}';
intro = '  📬最近' + ('{{$.toc[-1].createAt}}' ? '更新' : '同步') + '：' + java.timeFormat(timeStamp * 1000) + '\n‎\n' + intro;
intro
</js>
ruleBookInfo.name:
<js>
value = String(book.getVariable("custom")) || String(source.getVariable());
result = JSON.parse(result);
name = ['5', '8', '9'].includes(value) ? result.titleJp : result.titleZh || result.titleJp;
name
</js>

ruleContent.content: value = String(book.getVariable("custom")) || String(source.getVariable()); get = (value >= '1' && value <= '9') ? value : '1'; config = { 1: 'sakuraParagraphs', 2: 'gptParagraphs', 3: 'youdaoParagraphs', 4: 'baiduParagraphs', 5: 'paragraphs' }; result = JSON.parse(result); content = result[config[get]] || result[config[2]] || result[config[3]] || result[config[4]] || result[config[5]]; if (['6', '7', '8', '9'].includes(get)) { type = ['6', '8'].includes(get); jpContent = result[config[5]]; cnContent = result[config[1]] || result[config[2]] || result[config[3]] || result[config[4]]; if (cnContent) { content = jpContent.flatMap((jp, i) => (type ? [cnContent[i], jp] : [jp, cnContent[i]])).filter(Boolean); } else { content = jpContent; } }; regex = content => { displayedImages = new Set(); return JSON.stringify(content).replace(/<图片>(https?:\/\/[^"\s]+)/g, (_, p1) => { if (displayedImages.has(p1)) return ''; displayedImages.add(p1); return ''; }); }; format = content => content.replace(/^\[|\]$/g, '').split(',').map(item => item.trim().replace(/^"|"$/g, '')).filter(Boolean).map((item, i) => item.startsWith('{"headers"') && i > 0 ? ',' + item : ' ' + item).join("\n"); format(regex(content));

searchUrl:
<js>
providers = {
    kakuyomu: /(?:https?:\/\/)?kakuyomu\.jp\/works\/(\d+)/,
    syosetu: /(?:https?:\/\/)?(ncode|novel18)\.syosetu\.com\/(\w+)/,
    novelup: /(?:https?:\/\/)?novelup\.plus\/story\/(\d+)/,
    hameln: /(?:https?:\/\/)?syosetu\.org\/novel\/(\d+)/,
    pixiv: /(?:https?:\/\/)?(www\.pixiv\.net\/novel\/series\/(\d+)|www\.pixiv\.net\/novel\/show\.php\?id=(\d+))/,
    alphapolis: /(?:https?:\/\/)?www\.alphapolis\.co\.jp\/novel\/(\d+)\/(\d+)/,
    sakura: /(?:https?:\/\/)?books\d?\.fishhawk\.top\/(?:api\/)?novel\/(\w+)\/([\w-]+)/
};
for (provider in providers) {
    match = key.match(providers[provider]);
    if (match) {
        providerId = provider === 'sakura' ? match[1] : provider;
        novelId = provider === 'alphapolis' ? `${match[1]}-${match[2]}` : provider === 'pixiv' ? (match[3] ? `s${match[3]}` : match[2]) : (match[2] || match[1]);
        url = `${baseUrl}/api/novel/${providerId}/${novelId}`;
        break;
    } else {
        url = `${baseUrl}/api/novel?page=${page-1}&pageSize=20&query=${key}&provider=kakuyomu,syosetu,novelup,hameln,pixiv,alphapolis&type=0&level=0&translate=0&sort=1`;
    }
    url
}
</js>
variableComment: 输入对应数字刷新即可获取对应文本，{1: "sakura译文", 2: "gpt译文", 3: "有道译文", 4: "百度译文", 5: "原文", 6: "中日", 7: "日中", 8: "5+6", 9: "5+7"}，默认sakura译文。书籍变量作用于一本书，源变量作用于整个书源，书籍变量优先级高于源变量。
